preamble: Prothesis of the palatal glide [j] (y) is a widespread phenomenon, particularly in Slavic languages where it was added before initial front vowels.

examples.note: Prothetic /j/ inserted before initial front vowel *a → ja. Well-documented Slavic y-prothesis before front vowels.
Prothetic /j/ before *e: *ez- → *jez-. Note: *językъ is already the PS form with j-prothesis; the pre-Slavic root lacked it.
